examples.input: Scan https://github.com/org/my-website.git branch main against WCAG 2.1 AA. Live URL: https://my-website.com
examples.description: Full accessibility scan — code + live — against WCAG 2.1 AA standard
expected_flow: 5. Run runtime scan on live URL (axe-core, pa11y, Lighthouse)
9. Offer fix remediation (user confirms each edit)

examples.input: Check accessibility of local path /Users/dev/projects/my-app against WCAG 2.2 Level A
examples.description: Code-only scan against WCAG 2.2 A — no live URL needed
expected_flow: 4. Run static analysis (html-validate, eslint, pattern scan)

examples.input: Audit https://example.com for Section 508 compliance. Check pages: /, /about, /contact, /services
examples.description: Live-only scan against Section 508 (maps to WCAG 2.0 AA)
expected_flow: 3. Scan 4 pages at desktop + mobile viewports
4. Run axe-core with section508 + wcag2a + wcag2aa tags
8. Present findings with WCAG SC references

examples.input: Fix the accessibility issues found in the last scan. Ask me before each change.
examples.description: Fix mode — remediate violations with user confirmation per edit
expected_flow: 1. Load previous scan findings from accessibility-analysis/findings.json
a. Present violation (WCAG SC, element, who is affected)

examples.input: Check if our EDS blocks meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Repo: https://github.com/org/eds-site.git branch develop
examples.description: EDS-specific accessibility scan — checks block JS for a11y patterns
expected_flow: 4. Run pattern scan for common EDS a11y issues:
- Missing ARIA on dynamic block content
6. Offer fixes respecting EDS decorate(block) pattern

examples.input: Full EN 301 549 audit for EU compliance. Repo: git@github.com:corp/portal.git branch release/v2. Live: https://portal.corp.eu. Viewports: both. All pages.
examples.description: EU standard compliance audit — full scan with all viewports
expected_flow: 1. Confirm standard: EN 301 549 (maps to WCAG 2.1 AA)
8. Flag issues relevant to EN 301 549 specifically

common_findings.title: Non-text Content
common_findings.typical_fix: Add descriptive alt or alt="" for decorative

common_findings.title: Contrast (Minimum)
common_findings.common_violation: Text color vs background below 4.5:1 ratio
common_findings.typical_fix: Darken text or lighten background to meet ratio

common_findings.title: Keyboard
common_findings.common_violation: Interactive elements only work with mouse
common_findings.typical_fix: Add keyboard event handlers + tabindex + role

common_findings.title: Name, Role, Value
common_findings.typical_fix: Add appropriate role, aria-expanded, aria-selected etc.
